project_description: Telegram remote control assistant for computer management

bugs.title: Web UI buttons show 'Failed to fetch' error
bugs.description: All Web UI buttons (chat send, screenshot, system exec) are non-functional and return 'Failed to fetch' errors. Expected: buttons invoke backend APIs successfully. Actual: browser network tab shows connection errors for all endpoints. Root cause: Server binds to 127.0.0.1 (localhost only) while users access from external IP addresses. Browser relative URL API calls (/api/*) attempt to connect to user's access IP, but backend only listens on 127.0.0.1, causing connection refused.
reproduction_steps: Click chat send button or screenshot button
Observe browser console showing Failed to fetch error
acceptance_criteria: Web UI from non-127.0.0.1 IP can call /api/chat
Web UI from non-127.0.0.1 IP can call /api/screenshot
Web UI from non-127.0.0.1 IP can call /api/system/exec (with ENABLE_SYSTEM_EXEC=true)
No CORS or connection errors in browser console

bugs.title: System exec button returns ENABLE_SYSTEM_EXEC not enabled error
bugs.description: Web UI system exec button returns backend error indicating system command execution is disabled. Expected: users can input commands (ls, pwd) and see output. Actual: /api/system/exec returns error message stating ENABLE_SYSTEM_EXEC must be set to true. Root cause: .env configuration has ENABLE_SYSTEM_EXEC=false (default), which is a security protection but prevents testing in development.
reproduction_steps: Access Web UI system exec panel

bugs.title: Telegram messages receive no reply from bot
bugs.description: Users send messages to Telegram bot but receive no response. Expected: messages handled by AI CLI proxy and results returned. Actual: no reply received (no message, no error). Root causes (priority order): 1) bot.launch() Promise not awaited in src/index.js:26 causing async startup failures to be uncaught. 2) User not in ALLOWED_USER_IDS set causing permission denial. 3) CodeBuddy binary misconfigured causing spawn failure. 4) Global error handler logs but does not reply to user.
reproduction_steps: Ensure npm run dev or npm start is running
Send any text message to bot via Telegram
acceptance_criteria: Messages receive AI CLI result or welcome response within 10 seconds
Permission check failures return clear error message
CodeBuddy binary configured correctly and executable
No unhandled exceptions in application logs

global_context.tech_stack: Node.js + Express + Telegraf + React Web UI
global_context.testing_strategy: Unit + Integration tests via Node test runner
